source_quote: Adam has autonomously generated functional genomics hypotheses about the yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae and experimentally tested these hypotheses by using laboratory automation (King et al. 2009).
showcases its potential across six diverse tasks ... while exhibiting advanced capabilities for (semi-)autonomous experimental design and execution (Boiko et al. 2023).

the first system to close the full research loop ... automated peer review (balanced accuracy 0.65 predicting ICLR 2022 accept/reject labels; the 0.66 human figure often set beside it is inter-reviewer consistency on a different pool) (Lu et al. 2024).

agentic tree search ... replication nodes ... automated reviewer (balanced accuracy 0.69 on pre-cutoff data, 0.66 after the knowledge cutoff) ... external workshop review, outside the loop (Lu et al. 2026, Nature).
the automated reviewer over-estimates quality by +2.3 points relative to human PhD students (Schmidgall et al. 2025).
a unified closed-loop multi-agent framework ... idea generation, methodology, experiment execution, and result feedback across twelve tasks (Zhang et al. 2025).
